Economy System Types

Type definitions for economy system per economy.md

Core economic concepts:

  • PU (Population Units): Economic production measure
  • PTU (Population Transfer Units): ~50k souls for colonization
  • GCO (Gross Colony Output): Total colony production
  • NCV (Net Colony Value): Taxed colony revenue
  • IU (Industrial Units): Manufacturing capacity
Constants per economy.mdHelper Procs

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../prestige

Types

ColonyIncomeReport = object
  colonyId*: SystemId
  owner*: HouseId
  populationUnits*: int
  grossOutput*: int
  taxRate*: int
  netValue*: int
  populationGrowth*: float
  prestigeBonus*: int
Income report for single colony 
CompletedProject = object
  colonyId*: SystemId
  projectType*: ConstructionType
  itemId*: string
Construction project completed this turn 
ConstructionProject = object
  projectType*: ConstructionType
  itemId*: string
  costTotal*: int
  costPaid*: int
  turnsRemaining*: int
Construction project at colony 
ConstructionType {.pure.} = enum
  Ship, Building, Industrial, Infrastructure
HouseIncomeReport = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  colonies*: seq[ColonyIncomeReport]
  totalGross*: int
  totalNet*: int
  taxRate*: int
  taxAverage6Turn*: int
  taxPenalty*: int
  totalPrestigeBonus*: int
  treasuryBefore*: int
  treasuryAfter*: int
  transactions*: seq[TreasuryTransaction]
  prestigeEvents*: seq[PrestigeEvent]
Income report for entire house 
IncomePhaseReport = object
  turn*: int
  houseReports*: Table[HouseId, HouseIncomeReport]
Complete income phase results 
IndustrialUnits = object
  units*: int
  investmentCost*: int
Industrial capacity at colony 
MaintenanceReport = object
  turn*: int
  completedProjects*: seq[CompletedProject]
  houseUpkeep*: Table[HouseId, int]
  repairsApplied*: seq[tuple[colonyId: SystemId, repairAmount: float]]
Maintenance phase results 
ProductionOutput = object
  grossOutput*: int
  netValue*: int
  populationProduction*: int
  industrialProduction*: int
Output from a single colony or entire house 
TaxPolicy = object
  currentRate*: int
  history*: seq[int]
House tax policy 
TransactionCategory {.pure.} = enum
  TaxIncome, Construction, Maintenance, Research, IndustrialInvestment,
  Terraforming, Prestige     ## Reports
TreasuryTransaction = object
  source*: string
  amount*: int
  category*: TransactionCategory
Single income/expense transaction

Consts

BASE_IU_COST = 30
TAX_HIGH_THRESHOLD = 50

Procs

proc calculatePTU(pu: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Convert PU to PTU per economy.md:3.1 Formula: PTU = pu - 1 + exp(0.00657 * pu)

This exponential relationship models dis-inflationary economics: High-PU colonies contribute many PTUs with minimal PU loss, incentivizing population concentration and growth.

proc calculatePU(ptu: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Convert PTU to PU per economy.md:3.1 Inverse of calculatePTU using binary search approximation (Lambert W function is complex to implement in Nim)

Accurate within ±1 PU which is acceptable for game mechanics

Exports

HouseId, SystemId, PrestigeEvent

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
